name: Pupukea Grill
tagline: Parked across from Banzai Pipeline since 2008 — the surfers lining up here aren't wrong, this is the North Shore's best poke bowl.
parking: Between Pupukea Beach Park and Sharks Cove
talkStory: Started as a food truck parked across from Pipeline around 2008, built a loyal following among North Shore surfers and locals for fresh, no-frills poke bowls at beach prices. Tue–Sun 11am–5pm, closed Mon.
